_comment: Sample input bundle for stale_knowledge_scan tests and integration use. Triggers 3 stale types: source_hash_changed (hash mismatch), source_deleted (exists=false), evidence_expired (expires_at before as_of). The meta.as_of field is advisory only — the service accepts as_of as a direct parameter.

meta.description: Wave 16-A sample bundle — deterministic, no live data
